actions.text: 🚫 Access denied. You must be in the Admins group to use CRM Operations.

⏱️ CRM session timed out (5 min inactivity).

Type *ops menu* to start again.

👤 *Contacts*

🔍 Lookup — search by phone
⬅️ Back — return to main menu
👤 Enter a phone number to look up (e.g. +50937145893):

📋 *Groups*

📋 List — show all groups
➕ Create — make a new group
⬅️ Back
➕ Enter a name for the new group:

⚙️ *System*

ℹ️ Org Info — workspace details
📡 Channels — channel status
⬅️ Back

💬 *Messages*

✉️ Send — send a message to a contact
⬅️ Back
📝 Type the message text to send:

✅ CRM session ended.

Type *ops menu* to start again.
